name: routines
description: Orchestrator skills (meta-skills) for daily/weekly backoffice routines. Each routine chains leaf skills from account-transaction and position in sequence, captures structured output between steps, branches on results, and emits a per-run report. Fires via Claude Cowork Desktop scheduled tasks (local, full MCP access); also runs manually. Orchestrators never touch the DB directly — all writes go through leaf skills, preserving every CheckedDate / lock / sign guard.
